rule_text: Significant bonus terms (wagering, minimum deposit, expiry) must appear together with the headline offer, not only behind a link.
An offer must not be described as free if claiming it requires a deposit or spend.
The page must display all three: a responsible-gambling notice, an 18+ statement, and a link or reference to a gambling-help resource.
Pages promoting a gambling offer must carry a safer-gambling tagline.
No claims of guaranteed winnings or risk-free gambling in any wording.
Gambling offers must not use urgency pressure such as countdowns, last-chance, or ends-soon wording.
Content must not use language, characters, or references with primary appeal to under-18s.
A page targeting the GBR market and promoting operators or offers must display a GBR licence reference line.
